name: meowpayments
description: Custom crypto payment processor proxying near intents
longDescription: meowpayments is a custom crypto payment processor built using the free Near API, handling all major networks & tokens. Built for and used by horr.id, it was created for a privacy focused, no AML-check solution to other existing services such as nowpayments

name: horr.id
description: is an email, file hosting & biolink platform focused on simplicity
longDescription: horr.id is platform combining email hosting, file storage, and biolink pages into one clean interface.

name: DiSpy
description: A distributed Discord event logging and processing system
longDescription: DiSpy is a high-throughput distributed system for capturing, processing, and storing Discord gateway events at scale. Uses a multi-worker architecture with CQL (Cassandra) for time-series event storage, Python for microservices & Svelte for frontend

name: asdfgh
description: An open source, advanced discord bot complete with a dashboard
longDescription: asdfgh is a fully-featured open source Discord bot built with discord.py & FastAPI, covering protection & moderation features through an advanced web dashboard, using aiosqlite for database

name: meowurl
description: A VS Code extension for testing OpenAPI/Swagger endpoints
longDescription: meowurl is a VS Code extension for testing OpenAPI/Swagger endpoints directly in your editor.

name: meowavatar
description: Self-hosted service that allows you to easily access avatars from any platform
longDescription: meowavatar is a self-hosted service that allows you to easily access avatars from any platform. It provides a simple API for fetching and displaying avatars

longDescription: This is a placeholder project for future work. It will be updated
